headline: Allegion (ALLE) Down 11% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Allegion (ALLE) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Q4 Earnings Roundup: Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) And The Rest Of The Electrical Systems Segment
summary: As the Q4 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the electrical systems industry, including Allegion (NYSE:ALLE) and its peers.
